summary: Completed testing of Relationship Case Database feature. Backend: 12/12 tests passed - GET /api/cases/stats returns 300 cases with all 5 outcomes, case_comparison object properly returns total_cases, similar_case_count, outcome_breakdown, and insights. Pattern statistics computed from case database. Frontend code review confirms all required elements present (data-testid attributes, 300 cases text, insights, disclaimer). E2E UI test partially completed (got through baseline, changes, timeline, 1 question before timeout). Backend API verification confirmed all functionality working.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/cases/stats returns outcome_distribution with all 5 outcomes (confirmed_infidelity, emotional_disengagement, misunderstanding, personal_crisis, unresolved_conflict)
Backend: Results endpoint returns case_comparison with total_cases, similar_case_count, outcome_breakdown, insights
Backend: Case comparison with high signals (phone_secrecy+emotional_distance+schedule_changes+defensive_behavior) returns similar_case_count > 0
Backend: Case comparison with no changes returns 0 matching cases gracefully
Backend: Case comparison insights are dynamic based on user's selected changes
Backend: Pattern statistics computed from case database (not hardcoded)

Backend: Each case has all required fields (case_id, relationship_type, relationship_duration, age_range, cohabitation, primary_signals, secondary_signals, timeline, micro_contradictions_present, outcome, confidence_level)
Backend: Outcome breakdown contains only valid outcome types
Backend: Insights contain pattern matching text when similar cases found
Backend: Signal mapping (phone_secrecy, emotional_distance, etc.) works correctly
Backend: Multiple signal overlap increases or maintains similar case matches
Frontend Code Review: Pattern Comparison section has data-testid='pattern-comparison-section'
Frontend Code Review: Case insights have data-testid='case-insight-0', 'case-insight-1', etc.
Frontend Code Review: '300 documented relationship cases' text present
Frontend Code Review: Similar cases badge with count present
Frontend Code Review: Disclaimer 'does not prove or confirm infidelity' present
critical_code_review_comments: Case database properly seeded with 300 cases using deterministic seed (random.seed(42))
All 5 outcome types present with weighted distribution based on signal severity
compare_with_case_database() function properly maps user change categories to case signal names
Frontend ResultsDashboard.jsx Stage 8 (revealStage >= 8) renders Pattern Comparison section
Case comparison insights dynamically generated based on actual matching cases

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified all elements present. E2E test partial due to question flow timeout

seed_data_creation: 300 relationship cases auto-seeded on startup via seed_case_database() function
context_for_next_testing_agent: Case database feature fully functional. Backend API tests comprehensive. Frontend code review confirmed all required UI elements and data-testids. E2E Playwright testing partial - the question answering flow has timing issues with AI response delays. Backend creates sessions correctly; case comparison returns proper data. To test Results page UI manually: run full analysis flow with 4+ high-risk changes (phone_secrecy, emotional_distance, schedule_changes, defensive_behavior) to generate similar cases.
mocked_api_note: AI analysis uses Claude Sonnet 4.5 via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY with fallback to hardcoded responses. Case database is REAL (300 generated cases in MongoDB relationship_cases collection). Pattern statistics computed from actual case data when similar cases > 0.
